ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL -GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL GROUP, A MEDICAL CORPORATION PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS, CSM-11-839479 AND CSM-12-839526, ARE, INFACT, ONE CLAIM, PROSECUTED AS TWO IN ORDER TO AVOID THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS OF SMALL CLAIM COURT. BECAUSE IT EXCEEDS THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS OF SMALL CLAIMS COURT, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO FILING IN THE PROPER COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
